templates.name: partial_effect_ledger
templates.instantiate: For each destructive command, enumerate intent, first irreversible effect, durable receipt, crash points, retry permission, repair owner, and terminal evidence.

templates.name: release_identity_chain
templates.instantiate: Bind Git SHA, source tree, migration head, compose hash, config hash, image digests, manifest signature, and verifier result.

templates.name: restore_continuity
templates.instantiate: Bind backup ID, database snapshot, filesystem snapshot, secret version, restore target, migration compatibility, and post-restore proof refinding.

templates.name: authority_clock
templates.instantiate: For each lease, expiry, retry, health, and rate decision, identify the clock authority, skew assumptions, stored timestamps, and stale-decision rejection.

templates.name: topology_health
templates.instantiate: Define the full release topology and deny healthy status when any required service, network, dependency, migration, or identity binding is absent.

templates.name: rollback_compatibility
templates.instantiate: For each release mutation, prove backward, forward, or explicitly one-way compatibility and preserve accepted work across rollback.

templates.name: operator_actionability
templates.instantiate: Every ambiguous, failed, degraded, repairing, restored, rolled-back, saturated, or blocked state must expose identity, evidence, recommended action, authority, and terminal condition.

templates.name: saturation_fairness
templates.instantiate: Measure per-employee and global CPU, memory, connections, queues, SSE clients, wait time, work conservation, noisy-neighbor impact, and stop thresholds.
